meta.title: US Fighter Pilot charged with training China's Air Force?!
meta.description:
A former U.S. Air Force fighter pilot named Gerald Eddie Brown, who flew under the call sign “Runner,” was arrested on Wednesday after spending the last two years in China, where he’s alleged to have worked directly with the People’s Liberation Army, sharing American secrets and training Chinese pilots to fight his own former peers in the sky.
